response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist senior engineer with broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, Java), but the role demands 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows with SQL Server/Oracle and Fixed Income or Capital Markets domain exposure. C++ experience is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a bachelor thesis, with no recent C++ work, no Windows-platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle depth, and no financial-services background. Mismatch on every mandatory axis.
strengths: Senior engineering tenure with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices
Brief prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer-tooling product
Strong communication evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Only ~7 months of C++ experience, over a decade ago, far below the 5-10 year requirement
No demonstrated Windows-platform development or SQL Server/Oracle expertise
Zero Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain background

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
